parameters.jsCode:
// Build the body for the Analyzer LLM (Anthropic Messages API).
const d = $json;

const systemPrompt = [
  'You are a senior QA reviewer for the AYKA Transport voice assistant (carpet, upholstery and curtain cleaning logistics in Brussels).',
  'Analyze this call transcript. Did the assistant follow logistics protocols? Did it hallucinate? Extract a concise list of errors/friction points.',
  '',
  'Logistics protocols you must check (non-exhaustive):',
  '- Never invent a name (only "Ayka Tapis"; never "Redeka", "Aikatapi", etc.).',
  '- Never give a precise pickup hour window — only the day. Hour windows are forbidden.',
  '- Never round square metres. Multiply width × length exactly.',
  '- Always ask for the postal code / commune before quoting a total (delivery zone A/B/C).',
  '- Never claim "we only clean carpets" — sofas, mattresses and curtains are also offered.',
  '- Numbers and prices must be spoken in words, not digits.',
  '- Tool failures, premature endCall, or stuck silences count as errors.',
  '',
  'Return STRICT JSON only — no prose, no markdown fences. Schema:',
  '{',
  '  "success_score": <float 0..1>,',
  '  "summary": "<one short sentence>",',
  '  "errors": [',
  '    { "type": "<short snake_case key>", "severity": "low|medium|high|critical", "description": "<what went wrong>", "evidence": "<verbatim quote or tool-call slice>" }',
  '  ],',
  '  "protocol_violations": ["<short tag>"],',
  '  "hallucinations": ["<short tag>"]',
  '}'
].join('\n');

const userMessage = [
  `Call ID: ${d.call_id}`,
  `Assistant ID: ${d.assistant_id}`,
  `Duration: ${d.duration}s`,
  `Ended reason: ${d.ended_reason}`,
  `VAPI success evaluation: ${JSON.stringify(d.success_evaluation)}`,
  '',
  '--- TRANSCRIPT ---',
  String(d.transcript || '').slice(0, 12000),
  '',
  '--- TOOL CALLS ---',
  JSON.stringify(d.tool_calls || [], null, 2).slice(0, 4000),
  '',
  '--- VAPI SUMMARY ---',
  String(d.summary || '').slice(0, 2000)
].join('\n');

return [{
  json: {
    ...d,
    analyzer_body: {
      model:      'claude-haiku-4-5',
      max_tokens: 2048,
      system:     systemPrompt,
      messages:   [ { role: 'user', content: userMessage } ]
    }
  }
}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, status: 'analyzed_and_proposed', call_id: $('Parse Analysis').item.json.call_id, approval_token: $('Parse Optimizer').item.json.approval_token }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, status: 'analyzed_no_action', call_id: $('Parse Analysis').item.json.call_id, errors: $('Parse Analysis').item.json.detected_errors.length }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'deployed', approved_at: new Date().toISOString(), deployed_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
